title.en: What kind of problem is this?

label.en: The product or service was misleading or not what I was promised
label.zh-Hans: 商品或服务具有误导性，或与承诺不符

label.en: I already asked the seller, but the issue is still not resolved
label.zh-Hans: 我已经联系过卖家，但问题仍未解决

label.en: Part of my rental bond was deducted for cleaning, damage, or property condition issues
label.zh-Hans: 我的租房押金因清洁、损坏或房屋状况问题被扣掉了一部分

title.en: What have you done so far?
title.zh-Hans: 到目前为止你做了什么？

label.en: I have not contacted the seller, landlord, or agent yet
label.zh-Hans: 我还没有联系卖家、房东或中介

label.en: I contacted them once, but I did not get a clear answer
label.zh-Hans: 我联系过一次，但没有得到明确答复

label.en: I have already gone back and forth, but nothing is changing
label.zh-Hans: 我已经反复沟通过，但情况没有变化

label.en: They clearly refused, deducted money, or said they will not fix it
label.zh-Hans: 对方明确拒绝、扣了钱，或表示不会处理

label.en: Nothing urgent is happening right now
label.zh-Hans: 目前没有特别紧急的情况

label.en: I need to organise my evidence
I am still waiting for a clear reply
They keep repeating the same answer or refusing to help
label.zh-Hans: 对方一直重复同样的说法，或拒绝协助

label.en: I am worried messages, receipts, or evidence may be lost
label.zh-Hans: 我担心消息、收据或证据会丢失
